//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Type Definitions
//------------------------------------------------------------------------------

// "AFX_MODULE_STATE"
struct AFX_MODULE_STATE
{
	void* unknown_00;
	void* unknown_04;
	uint8_t m_hCurrentInstanceHandle[0x4];
};

// "AINet"
struct AINet
{
	int32_t netId;
	char name[0x14];
	enum AINetType aiType;
	float pathWidth;
	float activateRadius;
	float attackRadius;
	float attackDwell;
	float notPursuitDwell;
	float pursuitParam0;
	float pursuitParam1;
	float returnRange;
	float hideTime0;
	float hideTime1;
	int32_t activateBuddyNetId;
	int32_t attackBuddyNetId;
	enum AINetAttackStrategy attackStrategy;
	struct AINetNode* nodeListHead;
	struct AINet* next;
};

// "AINetAttackStrategy"
enum AINetAttackStrategy : uint32_t
{
	AINET_STRAT_HEA = 0x0,
	AINET_STRAT_CIR = 0x1,
	AINET_STRAT_BAC = 0x2,
	AINET_STRAT_FOL = 0x3,
	AINET_STRAT_ZIG = 0x4,
	AINET_STRAT_SIT = 0x5
};

// "AINetNeighborSlot"
union AINetNeighborSlot
{
	struct AINetNode* node;
	int32_t serializedNodeIndex;
};

// "AINetNode"
struct AINetNode
{
	struct zVec3 position;
	union AINetNeighborSlot neighborRefs[0x3];
	struct AINetPathProbeFan* probeFans[0x3];
	int32_t costOrType;
	int32_t nodeIndex;
	struct AINetNode* next;
};

// "AINetPathProbeFan"
struct AINetPathProbeFan
{
	struct zVec3 delta;
	float clampedTravel;
	struct zVec3 perpendicular;
	struct zVec3 probeDirPlus45;
	struct zVec3 probeDirMinus45;
	float pathWidth;
	char _pad_38[0x4];
};

// "AINetType"
enum AINetType : uint32_t
{
	AINET_TYPE_ST = 0x0,
	AINET_TYPE_HI = 0x1,
	AINET_TYPE_FI = 0x2,
	AINET_TYPE_DE = 0x3
};

// "AiPropertyDlg"
struct AiPropertyDlg
{
	struct CWnd base;
	char __padding_040[0x20];
	uint8_t selectedIndexFromComboC8[0x4];
	uint8_t selectedIndexFromCombo88[0x4];
	char __padding_068[0x20];
	uint8_t comboHwnd_88[0x4];
	char __padding_08c[0x3c];
	uint8_t comboHwnd_c8[0x4];
};

// "AtExitFunction"
typedef void (* AtExitFunction)();

// "BBox3f"
struct BBox3f
{
	struct zVec3 min;
	struct zVec3 max;
};

// "BriefingBuildObjectiveActionsFrame"
struct BriefingBuildObjectiveActionsFrame
{
	int32_t savedEsi;
	int32_t savedEdi;
	int32_t savedEbp;
	int32_t savedEbx;
	struct HudUiPanel* objectiveSummaryPanel;
	struct HudUiBriefingObjectivePicture* objectivePicture;
	struct HudUiPanel* missionNamePanel;
	struct HudUiPanel* objectiveDescPanel;
	char* objectiveSummaryText;
	char* objectiveDescText;
	struct zVid_Image* objectiveImage;
	char objectiveTitleBuffer[0x20];
	char sampleName[0x50];
};

// "CDialog"
struct CDialog
{
	struct CDialogVTable* vtable;
	struct CWnd base;
	__padding char _44[0x1c];
	struct CWnd wnd_060;
	struct CWnd wnd_0A0;
	struct CWnd wnd_0E0;
	struct CWnd wnd_120;
	struct CWnd wnd_160;
	struct CWnd wnd_1A0;
	struct CWnd wnd_1E0;
	struct CWnd wnd_220;
	struct CWnd wnd_260;
	struct CWnd wnd_2A0;
	struct CWnd wnd_2E0;
	struct CWnd wnd_320;
	struct CWnd wnd_360;
	struct CWnd wnd_3A0;
	struct CWnd wnd_3E0;
	struct CWnd wnd_420;
	struct CWnd wnd_460;
	uint32_t field_4A0;
	uint32_t field_4A4;
	uint32_t field_4A8;
	uint32_t field_4AC;
	uint32_t field_4B0;
	uint8_t lresult[0x4];
	uint32_t CDaoIndexFieldInfo_index_4B8;
	uint32_t CDaoIndexFieldInfo_index_4BC;

// "HitSourceDamageFeedbackOverlay"

{

	void* function_44;
	void* function_48;
	void* function_4c;
	void* function_50;
	void* function_54;
	void* function_58;
	int32_t (__thiscall* HitTest)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self, int32_t px, int32_t py);
	void (__thiscall* SetVisible)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self, int32_t visible);
	int32_t (__thiscall* GetX)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* GetY)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self);
	void* function_6c;
	int32_t (__thiscall* GetRect)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self, struct HudUiRect* outRect);
	void (__thiscall* RebuildBltRect)(struct HudUiBackgroundVideoWidget* self);
};

	void (* DrawBase)(struct HudUiElement* self);

	void (* SetX)(struct HudUiElement* self, int32_t x);
	void (* SetY)(struct HudUiElement* self, int32_t y);
	void (* SetClip)(struct HudUiElement* self, struct zVideo_BltSourceHead* bltSourceOrNull, struct HudUiRect const* rectOrNull);
	void (* SetClipRect)(struct HudUiElement* self, struct HudUiRect const* rectOrNull);
	void (* Invalidate)(struct HudUiWidget* self);
	void (* Update)(struct HudUiElement* self, float dt);
	void* function_28;
	struct HudUiRect* (* GetBoundsRectOrNull)(struct HudUiCycleSelectorWidget* self);
	void (* OnActivate)(struct HudUiCycleSelectorWidget* self);
	void* function_34;
	void* function_38;
	void (* ShowPreview)(struct HudUiZrdWidget* self);
	void (* HidePreview)(struct HudUiZrdWidget* self);
	void* function_44;
	void* function_48;
	void* function_4c;
	void* function_50;
	void* function_54;
	void* function_58;
	int32_t (* HitTest)(struct HudUiWidget* self, int32_t px, int32_t py);
	void (* SetVisible)(struct HudUiElement* self, int32_t visible);
	int32_t (* GetCenterX)(struct HudUiWidget* self);
	int32_t (* GetCenterY)(struct HudUiWidget* self);
	void* function_6c;
	int32_t (* GetRect)(struct HudUiWidget* self, struct HudUiRect* outRect);
	void (* RebuildBltRectFromImage)(struct HudUiWidget* self);
	void (* RefreshState)(struct HudUiCycleSelectorWidget* self);
	int32_t (* LoadFromZrd)(struct HudUiCycleSelectorWidget* self, struct zReader_Node* zrdSection, struct HudUiZrdDialog* owner);
	void* function_80;
	void* function_84;

// "HudUiElement"

	int32_t y;

	uint16_t state;
	uint16_t __padding_32;

// "HudUiPanel"
struct HudUiPanel
{
	struct HudUiPanel_FTable* vtbl;
	struct HudUiElement* next;
	void* parent;
	uint32_t flags;
	float timer;
	int32_t x;
	int32_t y;
	struct zVideo_BltSourceHead* bltSource;
	struct HudUiRect clipRect;
	uint16_t state;
	uint16_t __padding_32;
	char textBuffer[0x100];
	int32_t fontHandle;
	int32_t centerText;
	int32_t centerBoundsLeft;
	int32_t centerBoundsRight;
	int32_t alignMode;
	struct zVid_Image* textPick;
	ColorRef32 textColor0;
	ColorRef32 textColor1;
	uint8_t hFont[0x4];
	uint32_t fontParams;
	char textBufferCached[0x100];
	int32_t textWidthPx;
	int32_t textHeightPx;
	uint32_t shadowEnabled;
	uint32_t bkMode;
	ColorRef32 bkColor;
	uint32_t textDirty;
	uint32_t externalLeading;
	uint32_t wordWrapEnabled;
	struct HudUiRect wrapRect;
	struct HudUiRect textRect;
	int32_t shadowOffsetX;
	int32_t shadowOffsetY;
	int32_t layoutX;
	int32_t layoutY;
};

// "HudUiPanelCore"
struct HudUiPanelCore
{
	struct HudUiPanelCore_FTable* vtbl;
	struct HudUiElement* next;
	void* parent;
	uint32_t flags;
	float timer;
	int32_t x;
	int32_t y;
	struct zVideo_BltSourceHead* bltSource;
	struct HudUiRect clipRect;
	uint16_t state;
	uint16_t __padding_32;
	char textBuffer[0x100];
	int32_t fontHandle;
	int32_t centerText;
	int32_t centerBoundsLeft;
	int32_t centerBoundsRight;
	int32_t alignMode;
	struct zVid_Image* textPick;
	ColorRef32 textColor0;
	ColorRef32 textColor1;
	uint8_t hFont[0x4];
	uint32_t fontParams;
	char textBufferCached[0x100];
	int32_t textWidthPx;
	int32_t textHeightPx;
	uint32_t shadowEnabled;
	uint32_t bkMode;
	ColorRef32 bkColor;
	uint32_t textDirty;
	uint32_t externalLeading;
	uint32_t wordWrapEnabled;
	struct HudUiRect wrapRect;
	struct HudUiRect textRect;
	int32_t shadowOffsetX;
	int32_t shadowOffsetY;
};

// "HudUiPanelCore_FTable"
struct HudUiPanelCore_FTable
{
	struct HudUiPanelCore* (__thiscall* dtor)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, uint32_t flags);
	void (__thiscall* Draw)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
	void (__thiscall* DrawBase)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
	void (__thiscall* SetPos)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, int32_t x, int32_t y);
	void (__thiscall* SetX)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, int32_t v);
	void (__thiscall* SetY)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, int32_t v);
	void (__thiscall* SetClip)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, struct zVideo_BltSourceHead* bltSourceOrNull, struct HudUiRect const* rectOrNull);
	void (__thiscall* SetClipRect)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, struct HudUiRect const* rectOrNull);
	void (__thiscall* Invalidate)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
	void (__thiscall* Update)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, float deltaTime);
	void* field_28;
	void* field_2c;
	void* field_30;
	void* field_34;
	void* field_38;
	void* field_3c;
	void* field_40;
	void* field_44;
	void* field_48;
	void* field_4c;
	void* field_50;
	char (__thiscall* HitTest)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, int32_t px, int32_t py);
	void* field_58;
	void* field_5c;
	void (__thiscall* SetVisible)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, int32_t visible);
	int32_t (__thiscall* GetX)(struct HudUiPanelCore const* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* GetY)(struct HudUiPanelCore const* self);
	void (__thiscall* EnableWordWrapWithRect)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, struct HudUiRect const* rectOrNull);
	void (__thiscall* GetTextRect)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, struct HudUiRect* outRect);
	void (* SetTextFmt)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, char const* format, ...);
	void (__thiscall* UpdateTextBoundsFromContent)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetFont)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
	void (__thiscall* SetFont)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, char const* pszFaceName, int32_t cHeight, int32_t cWeight, int32_t cWidth, uint32_t bItalic, uint32_t iCharSet, uint32_t iPitchAndFamily);
	void* (__thiscall* SetFontHandle)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, void* hFont);
	void (* SetTextFmtV)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, char const* format, void* argList);
	void (__thiscall* SetText)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self, char const* text);
	void (__thiscall* RebuildTextRect)(struct HudUiPanelCore* self);
};

	void* field_38;
	void* field_3c;

	void* field_44;

	HudUiPanel_VT_GetCoord GetY;

};

typedef void (__thiscall* HudUiPanel_VT_Noarg)(struct HudUiPanel* self);

// "HudUiTriplet"
struct HudUiTriplet
{
	struct HudUiContainer base;
	struct HudUiPanel* headerPanels[0x3];
	struct HudUiPanel* rowCells[0x18];
	struct HudUiTripletEntries entries;
	int32_t baseX;
	int32_t baseY;
	int32_t rowPitchY;
	int32_t lapsColumnOffsetX;
	int32_t killsColumnOffsetX;
	int32_t fontSize;
	int32_t fontWeight;
	int32_t baseXStart;
	int32_t baseYStart;
	int32_t baseXEnd;
	int32_t baseYEnd;
	int32_t rowPitchYStart;
	int32_t rowPitchYEnd;
	int32_t lapsColumnOffsetXStart;
	int32_t lapsColumnOffsetXEnd;
	int32_t killsColumnOffsetXStart;
	int32_t killsColumnOffsetXEnd;
	int32_t fontSizeStart;
	int32_t fontSizeEnd;
	int32_t fontWeightStart;
	int32_t fontWeightEnd;
};

struct HudUiTripletEntries
{
	uint32_t rowInitFlag;

	struct HudUiScoreboardEntry* end;
	struct HudUiScoreboardEntry* cap;

{
	struct HudUiElement base;
	RECT* viewportRect;

	int32_t particleCount;

	float alphaStartScale;
	float alphaEndScale;
	struct zClass_Node* camera;
	int32_t activeParticleCount;
	struct zVec3* particlePositions[0x2];
	int32_t sourceBufferIndex;
	int32_t destBufferIndex;

	float windVelocity;
	float gravity;
	struct zVec3 basisVector;
	char* textureName;
	struct zVid_Image* softwareImage;
	struct zVideo_TextureRecord* textureRecord;

	float emitRadius;
	float emitDepth;
};

	float alphaEndScale;

	int32_t particlePosWriteIndex;

	float windVel;
	float gravity;

	float worldWindY;
	float worldWindZ;

	struct zVid_Image* textureImage;
	struct zVideo_TextureRecord* textureHandle;
	int32_t emitEnabled;
	float emitRadius;
	float emitDepth;
};

};

	uint32_t (* Release)(void* self);

	uint32_t (* AddRef)(struct IDirect3D2* self);
	uint32_t (* Release)(struct IDirect3D2* self);
	HRESULT (* EnumDevices)(struct IDirect3D2* self, int32_t (__stdcall* cb)(GUID* lpGuid, char* lpDeviceDescription, char* lpDeviceName, struct zVideo_dd_D3DDeviceDescFC* lpHWDeviceDesc, struct zVideo_dd_D3DDeviceDescFC* lpHELDeviceDesc, struct zVidHwApiDeviceRecord* ctx), struct zVidHwApiDeviceRecord* ctx);
	void* __pad10;
	HRESULT (* CreateMaterial)(struct IDirect3D2* self, struct IDirect3DMaterial2** outMat, struct IUnknown* unused);
	HRESULT (* CreateViewport)(struct IDirect3D2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2** outVp, struct IUnknown* unused);
	void* __pad1c;
	HRESULT (* CreateDevice)(struct IDirect3D2* self, GUID* pGuid, struct IDirectDrawSurface* renderTarget, struct IDirect3DDevice2** outDev);
};

// "IDirect3DDevice2"
struct IDirect3DDevice2
{
	struct IDirect3DDevice2VTable* lpVtbl;
};

// "IDirect3DDevice2VTable"
struct IDirect3DDevice2VTable
{
	HRESULT (* QueryInterface)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, GUID const* riid, void** ppv);
	uint32_t (* AddRef)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self);
	uint32_t (* Release)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self);
	HRESULT (* GetCaps)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct zVideo_D3DDeviceDesc* outHalDesc, struct zVideo_D3DDeviceDesc* outHelDesc);
	HRESULT (* SwapTextureHandles)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, void* texA, void* texB);
	HRESULT (* GetStats)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, void* outStats);
	HRESULT (* AddViewport)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2* viewport);
	HRESULT (* DeleteViewport)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2* viewport);
	HRESULT (* NextViewport)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2* viewport, struct IDirect3DViewport2** outNext, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* EnumTextureFormats)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, void* texA, void* texB);
	HRESULT (* BeginScene)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self);
	HRESULT (* EndScene)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self);
	HRESULT (* GetDirect3D)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, void** outD3D);
	HRESULT (* SetCurrentViewport)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2* viewport);
	HRESULT (* GetCurrentViewport)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirect3DViewport2** outViewport);
	HRESULT (* SetRenderTarget)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface* renderTarget, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* GetRenderTarget)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outRenderTarget);
	HRESULT (* Begin)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t primType, uint32_t vertexType, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* BeginIndexed)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t primType, uint32_t vertexType, void* vertices, uint32_t vertexCount, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* Vertex)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, void* outStats);
	HRESULT (* Index)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint16_t index);
	HRESULT (* End)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* GetRenderState)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, uint32_t* outValue);
	HRESULT (* SetRenderState)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, uint32_t value);
	HRESULT (* GetLightState)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, uint32_t* outValue);
	HRESULT (* SetLightState)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, uint32_t value);
	HRESULT (* GetTransform)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, void* outMatrix);
	HRESULT (* SetTransform)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, void* matrix);
	HRESULT (* MultiplyTransform)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t state, void* matrix);
	HRESULT (* DrawPrimitive)(struct IDirect3DDevice2* self, uint32_t primType, uint32_t vertexType, void* vertices, uint32_t vertexCount, uint32_t flags);
};

{

	uint32_t (* AddRef)(struct IDirectDraw2* self);
	uint32_t (* Release)(struct IDirectDraw2* self);

	HRESULT (* CreateClipper)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t flags, struct IDirectDrawClipper** outClipper, struct IUnknown* outer);
	HRESULT (* CreatePalette)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t flags, struct tagPALETTEENTRY* colorTable, struct IDirectDrawPalette** outPalette, struct IUnknown* outer);
	HRESULT (* CreateSurface)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* desc, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outSurf, struct IUnknown* outer);
	HRESULT (* DuplicateSurface)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface* srcSurface, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outDupSurface);
	HRESULT (* EnumDisplayModes)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t flags, void* desc, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (* EnumSurfaces)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t flags, void* desc, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (* FlipToGDI)(struct IDirectDraw2* self);
	HRESULT (* GetCaps)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct zVideo_DDrawCaps* outDriverCaps, struct zVideo_DDrawCaps* outHelCaps);
	HRESULT (* GetDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* outDesc);
	HRESULT (* GetFourCCCodes)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t* inoutCount, uint32_t* outCodes);
	HRESULT (* GetGDISurface)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outSurface);
	HRESULT (* GetMonitorFrequency)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t* outHz);
	HRESULT (* GetScanLine)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t* outScanline);
	HRESULT (* GetVerticalBlankStatus)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, int32_t* outInVBlank);
	HRESULT (* Initialize)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, GUID const* guid);
	HRESULT (* RestoreDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw2* self);
	HRESULT (* SetCooperativeLevel)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, HWND* hWnd, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* SetDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t bpp, uint32_t refresh, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* WaitForVerticalBlank)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, uint32_t flags, void* handle);
	HRESULT (* GetAvailableVidMem)(struct IDirectDraw2* self, struct DDSCAPS* caps, uint32_t* outTotal, uint32_t* outFree);
};

// "IDirectDrawSurface3_Vtbl"
struct IDirectDrawSurface3_Vtbl
{
	HRESULT (__stdcall* QueryInterface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, GUID const* riid, void** ppvObject);
	uint32_t (__stdcall* AddRef)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self);
	uint32_t (__stdcall* Release)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* AddAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* attached);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* AddOverlayDirtyRect)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct zVid_Rect32* rect);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Blt)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct zVid_Rect32* dstRect, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* srcSurface, struct zVid_Rect32* srcRect, int32_t flags, void* bltFx);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* BltBatch)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* bltBatch, int32_t count, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* BltFast)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t dstX, int32_t dstY, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* srcSurface, struct zVid_Rect32* srcRect, int32_t trans);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* DeleteAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* attached);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* EnumAttachedSurfaces)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* EnumOverlayZOrders)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Flip)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* targetOverride, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct DDSCAPS* inoutCaps, struct IDirectDrawSurface3** outAttached);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetBltStatus)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetCaps)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* outCaps);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetClipper)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawClipper** outClipper);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetColorKey)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags, void* outColorKey);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetDC)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct HDC__** outDc);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetFlipStatus)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetOverlayPosition)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t* outX, int32_t* outY);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetPalette)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawPalette** outPalette);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetPixelFormat)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct zVideo_DDPixelFormat* outDdPixelFormat);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetSurfaceDesc)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* outDesc);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Initialize)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* ddraw, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* desc);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* IsLost)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Lock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* rect, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDescLockView* desc, int32_t flags, void* hEvent);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* ReleaseDC)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct HDC__* dc);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Restore)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* SetClipper)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawClipper* clipper);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* SetColorKey)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags, void* colorKey);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* SetOverlayPosition)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t x, int32_t y);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* SetPalette)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct IDirectDrawPalette* palette);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* Unlock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void* outCaps);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* UpdateOverlay)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, struct zVid_Rect32* srcRect, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* dstSurface, struct zVid_Rect32* dstRect, int32_t flags, void* fx);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* UpdateOverlayDisplay)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* UpdateOverlayZOrder)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags, struct IDirectDrawSurface3* refSurface);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* GetDDInterface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, void** outDdraw);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* PageLock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags);
	HRESULT (__stdcall* PageUnlock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface3* self, int32_t flags);
};

// "IDirectDrawSurface_Vtbl"
struct IDirectDrawSurface_Vtbl
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, GUID const* riid, void** ppvObject);
	uint32_t (* AddRef)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self);
	uint32_t (* Release)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self);
	int32_t (* AddAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface* surf);
	int32_t (* AddOverlayDirtyRect)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct zVid_Rect32* rect);
	int32_t (* Blt)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct zVid_Rect32* dstRect, struct IDirectDrawSurface* srcSurface, struct zVid_Rect32* srcRect, int32_t flags, void* bltFx);
	int32_t (* BltBatch)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* bltBatch, int32_t count, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* BltFast)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t dstX, int32_t dstY, struct IDirectDrawSurface* srcSurface, struct zVid_Rect32* srcRect, int32_t trans);
	int32_t (* DeleteAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags, struct IDirectDrawSurface* surf);
	int32_t (* EnumAttachedSurfaces)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* context, void* callback);
	int32_t (* EnumOverlayZOrders)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags, void* context, void* callback);
	int32_t (* Flip)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface* targetOverride, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetAttachedSurface)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct DDSCAPS* caps, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outSurf);
	int32_t (* GetBltStatus)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetCaps)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* outCaps);
	int32_t (* GetClipper)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawClipper** outClipper);
	int32_t (* GetColorKey)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags, struct DDCOLORKEY* outColorKey);
	int32_t (* GetDC)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct HDC__** outDc);
	int32_t (* GetFlipStatus)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetOverlayPosition)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t* outX, int32_t* outY);
	int32_t (* GetPalette)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawPalette** outPalette);
	int32_t (* GetPixelFormat)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct zVideo_DDPixelFormat* outDdPixelFormat);
	int32_t (* GetSurfaceDesc)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* outDesc);
	int32_t (* Initialize)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* ddraw, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDesc* desc);
	int32_t (* IsLost)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self);
	int32_t (* Lock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* rect, struct zVideo_DDSurfaceDescLockView* desc, int32_t flags, void* hEvent);
	int32_t (* ReleaseDC)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct HDC__* dc);
	int32_t (* Restore)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self);
	int32_t (* SetClipper)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawClipper* clipper);
	int32_t (* SetColorKey)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t flags, struct DDCOLORKEY* colorKey);
	int32_t (* SetOverlayPosition)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, int32_t x, int32_t y);
	int32_t (* SetPalette)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, struct IDirectDrawPalette* palette);
	int32_t (* Unlock)(struct IDirectDrawSurface* self, void* rectOrPtr);
};

	HRESULT (* CreatePalette)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t flags, struct tagPALETTEENTRY* colorTable, struct IDirectDrawPalette** outPalette, struct IUnknown* outer);
	HRESULT (* CreateSurface)(struct IDirectDraw* self, struct DDSURFACEDESC* desc, struct IDirectDrawSurface** ppSurface, struct IUnknown* outer);
	HRESULT (* DuplicateSurface)(struct IDirectDraw* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface* srcSurface, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outDupSurface);
	HRESULT (* EnumDisplayModes)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t flags, void* desc, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (* EnumSurfaces)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t flags, void* desc, void* context, void* callback);
	HRESULT (* FlipToGDI)(struct IDirectDraw* self);
	HRESULT (* GetCaps)(struct IDirectDraw* self, struct zVideo_DDrawCaps* outDriverCaps, struct zVideo_DDrawCaps* outHelCaps);
	HRESULT (* GetDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw* self, struct DDSURFACEDESC* outDesc);
	HRESULT (* GetFourCCCodes)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t* inoutCount, uint32_t* outCodes);
	HRESULT (* GetGDISurface)(struct IDirectDraw* self, struct IDirectDrawSurface** outSurface);
	HRESULT (* GetMonitorFrequency)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t* outHz);
	HRESULT (* GetScanLine)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t* outScanline);
	HRESULT (* GetVerticalBlankStatus)(struct IDirectDraw* self, int32_t* outInVBlank);
	HRESULT (* Initialize)(struct IDirectDraw* self, GUID const* guid);
	HRESULT (* RestoreDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw* self);
	HRESULT (* SetCooperativeLevel)(struct IDirectDraw* self, void* hWnd, uint32_t flags);
	HRESULT (* SetDisplayMode)(struct IDirectDraw* self, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t bpp);

};

// "IDirectPlay4"
struct IDirectPlay4
{
	struct IDirectPlay4Vtbl* vftable;
};

// "IDirectPlay4Vtbl"
struct IDirectPlay4Vtbl
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, void* riid, void** outObject);
	uint32_t (* AddRef)(struct IDirectPlay4* self);
	uint32_t (* Release)(struct IDirectPlay4* self);
	void* AddPlayerToGroup;
	int32_t (* Close)(struct IDirectPlay4* self);
	void* CreateGroup;
	int32_t (* CreatePlayer)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t* outPlayerId, struct DPNAMEA* playerName, void* eventHandle, void* data, int32_t dataSize, int32_t flags);
	void* DeletePlayerFromGroup;
	void* DestroyGroup;
	int32_t (* DestroyPlayer)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t playerId);
	void* unknown_28[0x2];
	int32_t (* EnumPlayers)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, void* sessionGuid, int32_t (* callback)(int32_t playerId, int32_t playerType, struct DPNAMEA* playerNameInfo, int32_t flags, void* context), void* context, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* EnumSessions)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, struct zNetworkDPlaySessionDesc* desc, int32_t timeoutMs, int32_t (* callback)(struct zNetworkDPlaySessionDesc* sessionDesc, int32_t* timeoutMs, int32_t flags, void* context), void* context, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetCaps)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, struct zNetworkDPlayCaps* caps, int32_t flags);
	void* unknown_3c[0x4];
	int32_t (* GetPlayerCaps)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t playerId, struct zNetworkDPlayCaps* caps, int32_t flags);
	void* unknown_50[0x4];
	int32_t (* Open)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, struct zNetworkDPlaySessionDesc* desc, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Receive)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t* fromPlayerId, int32_t* toPlayerId, int32_t flags, void* data, uint32_t* dataSizeBytes);
	int32_t (* Send)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t fromPlayerId, int32_t toPlayerId, int32_t flags, void* data, uint32_t dataSizeBytes);
	void* unknown_6c[0x4];
	int32_t (* SetSessionDesc)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, struct zNetworkDPlaySessionDesc* desc, int32_t flags);
	void* unknown_80[0x3];
	int32_t (* EnumConnections)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, GUID* applicationGuid, int32_t (* callback)(struct zGuid* serviceProviderGuid, void* connectionData, int32_t connectionDataSize, struct DPNAMEA* providerName, int32_t providerFlags, void* context), void* context, int32_t flags);
	void* unknown_90[0x2];
	int32_t (* InitializeConnection)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, void* connectionData, int32_t flags);
	void* unknown_9c[0xa];
	int32_t (* SendEx)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t fromPlayerId, int32_t toPlayerId, int32_t flags, void* data, uint32_t dataSizeBytes, int32_t priority, int32_t timeout, void* context, int32_t* asyncHandle);
	int32_t (* GetMessageQueue)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t fromPlayerId, int32_t toPlayerId, int32_t flags, uint32_t* messageCount, uint32_t* byteCount);
	int32_t (* CancelMessage)(struct IDirectPlay4* self, int32_t asyncHandle, int32_t flags);
};

{
	OPT_ENTRY_CONTINUOUS_OR_SPECIAL_POLARITY = 0x2,
	OPT_ENTRY_CRATER = 0x8,
	OPT_ENTRY_EXPIRES = 0x40,
	OPT_ENTRY_FIXED_ROTATE = 0x80,
	OPT_ENTRY_TIMED_STATUS_SUBTRACTIVE = 0x200,
	OPT_ENTRY_TIMED_STATUS_FIXED_CONTRIBUTION = 0x800,
	OPT_ENTRY_UPDATES_STATUS_METER = 0x1000,
	OPT_ENTRY_MINE = 0x2000,
	OPT_ENTRY_LOCK_ON = 0x4000,
	OPT_ENTRY_LOCK_ON_LEAD = 0x8000,
	OPT_ENTRY_MULTI_TARGET = 0x10000,
	OPT_ENTRY_QUICKSAND = 0x20000,
	OPT_ENTRY_RELOAD = 0x40000,
	OPT_ENTRY_REMOTE_DETONATE = 0x80000,
	OPT_ENTRY_TETHER_GUIDED = 0x100000,
	OPT_ENTRY_APPLIES_TIMED_HIT_STATUS = 0x200000,
	OPT_ENTRY_ANIMATION_ALWAYS = 0x400000,
	OPT_ENTRY_RELATIVE_SPEED = 0x800000
};

// "OptCatalogRuntimeInstance"
struct OptCatalogRuntimeInstance
{
	struct OptCatalogRuntimeInstance* next;
	struct zClass_Node* ownerNode;
	int32_t spawnTypeFlags;
	struct zClass_Node* projectileNode;
	struct zEffectAnimEntry* flyoutAnimPrimary;
	struct zEffectAnimEntry* flyoutAnimSecondary;

	float originY;
	float originZ;

	float auxY;
	float auxZ;

	float dirY;
	float dirZ;
	float posX;
	float posY;
	float posZ;
	float velX;
	float velY;
	float velZ;
	float targetX;
	float targetY;
	float spawnGateAccum;
	float lifetime;
	float speed;
	char __padding_070[0x4];
	float rangeProgress;
	float scaleFade;
	float projectileScale;
	float spawnScale;
	void* ownerCtx;
	int32_t activeState;
};

// "OptCatalogRuntimeInstanceStorageView"
struct OptCatalogRuntimeInstanceStorageView
{
	struct OptCatalogRuntimeInstanceStorageView* next;
	struct zClass_Node* ownerNode;
	int32_t variantTag;
	struct zClass_Node* projectileNode;
	struct zEffectAnimEntry* flyoutAnimPrimary;
	struct zEffectAnimEntry* flyoutAnimSecondary;
	struct zEffectAnimEntry* asyncFxHandle;
	struct zClass_Node* attachCloneChild;
	struct zVec3 origin;
	struct zVec3 aux;
	struct zVec3 dir;
	struct zVec3 pos;
	struct zVec3 vel;
	struct zVec3* pendingTargetA;
	struct zVec3* pendingTargetB;
	float spawnGateAccum;
	float lifetime;
	float speed;
	int32_t unknown_70;
	float rangeProgress;
	float scaleFade;
	float projectileScale;
	float spawnScale;
	struct zUtil_SaveGameState* saveState;
	void (* updateCallback)(struct OptCatalogRuntimeInstanceStorageView* runtimeInstance);
};

// "PlayerAsyncEventCode"
enum PlayerAsyncEventCode : uint32_t
{
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_CLEAR_ACTIVE_DEBUG_SCRIPT_IF_MATCH = 0x0,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SET_CURRENT_SAVE_STATE_AND_REBUILD_CAMERA = 0x1,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_CLEAR_CURRENT_SAVE_STATE_AND_HIDE_HUD = 0x2,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SYNC_POSE_FROM_ROOT_NODE_AND_SHOW_MESSAGES = 0xa,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SET_AI_MODE_6_AND_UPDATE_LOOP_SFX = 0xb,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_DISABLE_LOCAL_CONTROL_AND_HUD = 0xe,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_ENABLE_LOCAL_CONTROL_AND_HUD = 0xf,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_RESET_MOTION_TRANSIENT_STATE = 0x10,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_CAPTURE_RESTART_ANCHOR = 0x11,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SET_ACTIVE_DEBUG_SCRIPT_ENTRY = 0x14,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_RESET_NANITE_PANEL_AND_APPLY_STATUS_METER_DAMAGE = 0x19,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_APPLY_STATUS_METER_DAMAGE = 0x1a,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_APPLY_TEN_DAMAGE = 0x1b,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SAVE_AND_PUSH_MISSION_STATE = 0x63,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SPAWN_RANDOM_VTOL_DROP = 0x38f,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SPAWN_VWBUS_PICKUP = 0x390,
	PLAYER_ASYNC_EVENT_SPAWN_CRBOX_PICKUP = 0x391,

// "RecoilApp"
struct RecoilApp

	struct RecoilApp_Vtbl* vftable;

	int32_t m_stateStackTopIndex;

	enum RecoilAppMissionShutdownMode m_missionShutdownMode;

	enum RecoilAppIntroFmvSkipMode m_skipIntroFmv;
	float m_transitionTimerSec;
	char _padding_154[0xc];
	struct RecoilApp_AttractFmvState m_attractFmvState;
	struct RecoilApp_IntroFmvState m_introFmvState;
	struct RecoilApp_MainMenuPrepState m_mainMenuPrepState;
	struct RecoilApp_LeaveNetworkState m_leaveNetworkState;
	struct RecoilApp_MissionFmvState m_missionFmvState;

	struct RecoilApp_MpExitDialogState m_mpExitDialogState;
};

// "RecoilAppAttractFmvReloadMode"
enum RecoilAppAttractFmvReloadMode : uint32_t
{
	RECOILAPP_ATTRACT_FMV_REUSE_LOADED_ACTIONS = 0x0,
	RECOILAPP_ATTRACT_FMV_RELOAD_FROM_ZRD = 0x1
};

// "RecoilAppDispatchStatus"
enum RecoilAppDispatchStatus : uint32_t
{
	RECOILAPP_DISPATCH_NOT_HANDLED = 0x0,
	RECOILAPP_DISPATCH_HANDLED = 0x1
};

	RECOILAPP_INITINSTANCE_CONTINUE = 0x1

	void (* OnWndActivate)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self, enum RecoilWndActivateState nState);
	void (* OnEnter)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self);
	int32_t (* OnTryBecomeCurrent)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self);
	int32_t (* OnUpdateShouldQuit)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self);
	void (* OnExit)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self);
	void (* OnDeactivate)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self);
	void (* OnSuspend)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self, int32_t param);
	void (* OnResume)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self, int32_t param);
	int32_t (* OnIdleOrDispatch)(struct RecoilApp_IState* self, int32_t wParam, int32_t lParam);
};

// "RecoilApp_MfcOleModule_Vtbl"
struct RecoilApp_MfcOleModule_Vtbl
{
	void* (* GetBaseRuntimeClass)();
	void (* ScalarDeletingDtor)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t flags);
	void* _pad08[0x3];
	int32_t (* OnCmdMsg)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t nID, int32_t nCode, void* pExtra, void* handlerInfo);
	void (* OnFinalRelease)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* _pad1c[0x4];
	struct MfcMsgMap* (* GetMessageMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (* GetCommandMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (* GetBaseDispatchMap)();
	void* (* GetBaseConnectionMap)();
	void* (* GetBaseInterfaceMap)();
	void* (* GetBaseEventSinkMap)();
	void* _pad44[0x3];
	void* _pad50;
	void* _pad54;
	void (* InitMainWindow)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* RunMainLoop)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	enum RecoilAppPreTranslateResult (* PreTranslateMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (* PumpMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* OnIdle)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t lCount);
	int32_t (* IsIdleMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (* ExitInstance)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* ProcessWndProcException)(struct RecoilApp* self, void* pException, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (* ProcessMessageFilter)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t code, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	struct CZRecoilFrame* (* GetMainWnd)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (* Delete)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (* OpenDocumentFile)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* path);
	void (* AddToRecentFileList)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* path);
	int32_t (* InitApplication)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* SaveAllModified)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* DoMessageBox)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* text, uint32_t type, uint32_t idPrompt);
	void (* DoWaitCursor)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t code);
	int32_t (* OnDDECommand)(struct RecoilApp* self, char* command);
	void (* WinHelpA)(struct RecoilApp* self, uint32_t data, uint32_t cmd);
	void (* OnAppActivate)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (* OnAppDeactivate)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (* EngineInit)(struct RecoilApp* self, HWND* hWnd);
	void (* ShutdownSubsystems)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (* OnIdleOrDispatch)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t wParam, int32_t lParam);
	struct CZRecoilFrame* (* CreateMainWnd)(struct RecoilApp* self);
};

// "RecoilApp_StateQueue"
struct RecoilApp_StateQueue
{
	int32_t m_ctorTag;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock m_readBlock;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock m_writeBlock;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem*** m_chunkBaseList;
	int32_t m_chunkBaseCapacity;
	int32_t m_itemCount;
};

// "RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock"
struct RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock
{
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem** m_chunkBegin;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem** m_chunkEnd;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem** m_cursor;
	struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem*** m_chunkBaseSlot;
};

// "RecoilApp_StateQueueChunk"
typedef struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem* RecoilApp_StateQueueChunk[0x400];

// "RecoilApp_StateQueueChunkList"
struct RecoilApp_StateQueueChunkList
{
	RecoilApp_StateQueueChunk** begin;
	RecoilApp_StateQueueChunk** end;
	RecoilApp_StateQueueChunk** cap;
};

// "RecoilApp_StateQueueItem"
struct RecoilApp_StateQueueItem
{
	int32_t m_reserved;
	enum RecoilApp_StateQueueKind m_kind;
	struct RecoilApp_IState* m_stateObj;
	int32_t m_param;
};

// "RecoilApp_StateQueueKind"
enum RecoilApp_StateQueueKind : uint32_t
{
	RecoilApp_StateQueueKind_ExitCurrent = 0x1,
	RecoilApp_StateQueueKind_PushState = 0x2,
	RecoilApp_StateQueueKind_SwitchCurrent = 0x3
};

// "RecoilApp_Vtbl"
struct RecoilApp_Vtbl
{
	void* (__thiscall* GetBaseRuntimeClass)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (__thiscall* ScalarDeletingDtor)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t flags);
	void* _pad08[0x3];
	int32_t (__thiscall* OnCmdMsg)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t nID, int32_t nCode, void* pExtra, void* handlerInfo);
	void (__thiscall* OnFinalRelease)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* _pad1c[0x4];
	struct MfcMsgMap* (__thiscall* GetMessageMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetCommandMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetBaseDispatchMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetBaseConnectionMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetBaseInterfaceMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* GetBaseEventSinkMap)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* _pad44[0x3];
	void* _pad50;
	void* _pad54;
	enum RecoilAppInitInstanceResult (__thiscall* InitInstance)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* RunMainLoop)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	enum RecoilAppPreTranslateResult (__thiscall* PreTranslateMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (__thiscall* PumpMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* OnIdle)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t lCount);
	int32_t (__thiscall* IsIdleMessage)(struct RecoilApp* self, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (__thiscall* ExitInstance)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* ProcessWndProcException)(struct RecoilApp* self, void* pException, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	int32_t (__thiscall* ProcessMessageFilter)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t code, struct tagMSG* pMsg);
	struct CZRecoilFrame* (__thiscall* GetMainWnd)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (__thiscall* Delete)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void* (__thiscall* OpenDocumentFile)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* path);
	void (__thiscall* AddToRecentFileList)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* path);
	int32_t (__thiscall* InitApplication)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* SaveAllModified)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* DoMessageBox)(struct RecoilApp* self, char const* text, uint32_t type, uint32_t idPrompt);
	void (__thiscall* DoWaitCursor)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t code);
	int32_t (__thiscall* OnDDECommand)(struct RecoilApp* self, char* command);
	void (__thiscall* WinHelpA)(struct RecoilApp* self, uint32_t data, uint32_t cmd);
	void (__thiscall* OnAppActivate)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	void (__thiscall* OnAppDeactivate)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* StartEngine)(struct RecoilApp* self, struct HWND__* hWnd);
	void (__thiscall* ShutdownEngine)(struct RecoilApp* self);
	int32_t (__thiscall* OnIdleOrDispatch)(struct RecoilApp* self, int32_t wParam, int32_t lParam);
	struct CZRecoilFrame* (__thiscall* CreateMainWnd)(struct RecoilApp* self);
};

struct SaveGameFindDataA
{
	uint32_t dwFileAttributes;
	__padding char _4[0x10];
	__padding char _14[8];
	uint32_t nFileSizeHigh;
	uint32_t nFileSizeLow;
	uint32_t dwReserved0;
	uint32_t dwReserved1;
	char cFileName[0x104];
	char cAlternateFileName[0xe];
	char __padding_13e[0x2];
};

	void* unknown;

	void** end;
	void** cap;
};

struct UnusedExport_Rich_Header
{
	uint32_t e_magic__DanS;
	uint32_t e_align[0x3];
	uint32_t e_entry_id0_;
	uint32_t e_entry_count0_;
	uint32_t e_entry_id1_;
	uint32_t e_entry_count1_;
	uint32_t e_entry_id2_;
	uint32_t e_entry_count2_;
	uint32_t e_entry_id3_;
	uint32_t e_entry_count3_;
	char e_magic[0x4];
	uint32_t e_checksum;
};

// "zA3dErrorCode"
enum zA3dErrorCode : uint32_t
{
	A3DERROR_MEMORY_ALLOCATION = 0x80040001,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_CREATE_PRIMARY_BUFFER = 0x80040002,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_CREATE_SECONDARY_BUFFER = 0x80040003,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_INIT_A3D_DRIVER = 0x80040004,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_QUERY_DIRECTSOUND = 0x80040005,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_QUERY_A3D3 = 0x80040006,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_INIT_A3D3 = 0x80040007,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_QUERY_A3D2 = 0x80040008,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_FILE_OPEN = 0x80040009,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_CREATE_SOUNDBUFFER = 0x8004000a,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_QUERY_3DINTERFACE = 0x8004000b,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_LOCK_BUFFER = 0x8004000c,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_UNLOCK_BUFFER = 0x8004000d,
	A3DERROR_UNRECOGNIZED_FORMAT = 0x8004000e,
	A3DERROR_NO_WAVE_DATA = 0x8004000f,
	A3DERROR_UNKNOWN_PLAYMODE = 0x80040010,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_PLAY = 0x80040011,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_STOP = 0x80040012,
	A3DERROR_NEEDS_FORMAT_INFORMATION = 0x80040013,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_ALLOCATE_WAVEDATA = 0x80040014,
	A3DERROR_NOT_VALID_SOURCE = 0x80040015,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_DUPLICATION = 0x80040016,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_INIT = 0x80040017,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_SETCOOPERATIVE_LEVEL = 0x80040018,
	A3DERROR_FAILED_INIT_QUERIED_INTERFACE = 0x80040019,
	A3DERROR_GEOMETRY_INPUT_OUTSIDE_BEGIN_END_BLOCK = 0x8004001a,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_NORMAL = 0x8004001b,
	A3DERROR_END_BEFORE_VALID_BEGIN_BLOCK = 0x8004001c,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_BEGIN_MODE = 0x8004001d,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_ARGUMENT = 0x8004001e,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_INDEX = 0x8004001f,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_VERTEX_INDEX = 0x80040020,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_PRIMITIVE_INDEX = 0x80040021,
	A3DERROR_MIXING_2D_AND_3D_MODES = 0x80040022,
	A3DERROR_2DWALL_REQUIRES_EXACTLY_ONE_LINE = 0x80040023,
	A3DERROR_NO_PRIMITIVES_DEFINED = 0x80040024,
	A3DERROR_PRIMITIVES_NON_PLANAR = 0x80040025,
	A3DERROR_PRIMITIVES_OVERLAPPING = 0x80040026,
	A3DERROR_PRIMITIVES_NOT_ADJACENT = 0x80040027,
	A3DERROR_OBJECT_NOT_FOUND = 0x80040028,
	A3DERROR_ROOM_HAS_NO_SHELL_WALLS = 0x80040029,
	A3DERROR_WALLS_DO_NOT_ENCLOSE_ROOM = 0x8004002a,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_WALL = 0x8004002b,
	A3DERROR_ROOM_HAS_LESS_THAN_4SHELL_WALLS = 0x8004002c,
	A3DERROR_ROOM_HAS_LESS_THAN_3UNIQUE_NORMALS = 0x8004002d,
	A3DERROR_INTERSECTING_WALL_EDGES = 0x8004002e,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_ROOM = 0x8004002f,
	A3DERROR_SCENE_HAS_ROOMS_INSIDE_ANOTHER_ROOMS = 0x80040030,
	A3DERROR_SCENE_HAS_OVERLAPPING_STATIC_ROOMS = 0x80040031,
	A3DERROR_DYNAMIC_OBJ_UNSUPPORTED = 0x80040032,
	A3DERROR_DIR_AND_UP_VECTORS_NOT_PERPENDICULAR = 0x80040033,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_ROOM_INDEX = 0x80040034,
	A3DERROR_INVALID_WALL_INDEX = 0x80040035,
	A3DERROR_SCENE_INVALID = 0x80040036,
	A3DERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED_FUNCTION = 0x80040037,
	A3DERROR_NO_ROOMS_IN_SCENE = 0x80040038,
	A3DERROR_2D_GEOMETRY_UNIMPLEMENTED = 0x80040039
};

// "zA3dGeom"
struct zA3dGeom
{
	struct zA3dGeomVtable* vtbl;
};

// "zA3dGeomVtable"
struct zA3dGeomVtable
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct zA3dGeom* self, void const* iid, void** outObject);
	int32_t (* AddRef)(struct zA3dGeom* self);
	int32_t (* Release)(struct zA3dGeom* self);
};

// "zA3dListener"
struct zA3dListener
{
	struct zA3dListenerVtable* vtbl;
};

// "zA3dListenerVtable"
struct zA3dListenerVtable
{
	int32_t (__stdcall* QueryInterface)(void* self, GUID* riid, void** outObject);
	uint32_t (__stdcall* AddRef)(void* self);
	uint32_t (__stdcall* Release)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* SetPosition)(void* self, float x, float y, float z);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_10)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_14)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_18)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_1c)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_20)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_24)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_28)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* SetOrientation)(void* self, float atX, float atY, float atZ, float upX, float upY, float upZ);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_30)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_34)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* unknown_38)(void* self);
	int32_t (__stdcall* SetVelocity)(void* self, float x, float y, float z);
};

// "zA3dSource"
struct zA3dSource
{
	struct zA3dSourceVtable* vtbl;
};

// "zA3dSourceVtable"
struct zA3dSourceVtable
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct zA3dSource* self, void const* iid, void** outObject);
	int32_t (* AddRef)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	int32_t (* Release)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	int32_t (* LoadWaveFile)(struct zA3dSource* self, char* path);
	int32_t (* LoadWaveData)(struct zA3dSource* self, void* waveData, int32_t bytes);
	int32_t (* AllocateWaveData)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t pcmBytes);
	int32_t (* FreeWaveData)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	int32_t (* SetWaveFormat)(struct zA3dSource* self, struct zWaveFormatExPacked* fmt);
	int32_t (* GetWaveFormat)(struct zA3dSource* self, void* outFmt);
	int32_t (* GetWaveSize)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	int32_t (* GetType)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t* outType);
	int32_t (* Lock)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t offset, int32_t bytes, void** outPtr1, int32_t* outBytes1, void** outPtr2, int32_t* outBytes2, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Unlock)(struct zA3dSource* self, void* ptr1, int32_t bytes1, void* ptr2, int32_t bytes2);
	int32_t (* Play)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t loopFlag);
	int32_t (* Stop)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	int32_t (* Rewind)(struct zA3dSource* self);
	void* SetWaveTime;
	void* GetWaveTime;
	int32_t (* SetMode)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t modeFlags);
	int32_t (* GetCurrentPosition)(struct zA3dSource* self, uint32_t* outPlayCursorBytes);
	int32_t (* SetPosition)(struct zA3dSource* self, float x, float y, float z);
	void* __padding_54[0xb];
	int32_t (* SetVelocity)(struct zA3dSource* self, float x, float y, float z);
	void* __padding_84[0x5];
	int32_t (* Configure)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t a2, int32_t a3);
	void* __padding_09c[0x1];
	int32_t (* SetGain)(struct zA3dSource* self, float value);
	void* GetGain;
	int32_t (* SetPitchScaled)(struct zA3dSource* self, float value);
	void* GetPitch;
	int32_t (* SetDopplerScale)(struct zA3dSource* self, float value);
	void* GetDopplerScale;
	int32_t (* SetDistanceScale)(struct zA3dSource* self, float value);
	void* __padding_0bc[0x5];
	int32_t (* SetSpatializationEnabled)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t enabledFlag);
	void* __padding_0d4[0x3];
	int32_t (* GetStatus)(struct zA3dSource* self, int32_t* outStatus);
};

// "zArchiveList"
struct zArchiveList
{
	int32_t count;
	int32_t reserved04;
	int32_t reserved08;
	int32_t reserved0c;
	struct zUtilFileIndexNode* head;
};

// "zArchiveListPredicate"
typedef int32_t (__fastcall* zArchiveListPredicate)(void* payload, void* ctx);

// "zArchiveMountResult"
enum zArchiveMountResult : uint32_t
{
	ZARCHIVE_MOUNT_FAILED = 0x0,
	ZARCHIVE_MOUNT_OK = 0x1
};

// "zBBoxCorners"
struct zBBoxCorners
{
	struct zVec3 corners[0x8];
};

// "zBasis3x3"
struct zBasis3x3
{
	float xx;
	float xy;
	float xz;
	float yx;
	float yy;
	float yz;
	float zx;
	float zy;
	float zz;
};

// "zBounds2D"
struct zBounds2D
{
	float minX;
	float minY;
	float maxX;
	float maxY;
};

// "zCamera_FrustumGridTile"
struct zCamera_FrustumGridTile
{
	int32_t col;
	int32_t row;
	int32_t hasPosOffset;
	float posOffsetX;
	float posOffsetZ;
	int32_t clipMask;
};

// "zCamera_FrustumGridTileRing"
struct zCamera_FrustumGridTileRing
{
	struct zCamera_FrustumGridTile tiles[0x1e];
	int32_t count;
};

// "zClass_AnimateData"
struct zClass_AnimateData
{
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t statusFlags;
	struct zMat4x3 animatedTransform;
	struct zMat4x3 savedParentMatrix;
	struct zClass_AnimateRuntime runtime;
};

struct zClass_AnimateKeyframe
{
	float basis[0x9];
};

// "zClass_AnimateRuntime"
struct zClass_AnimateRuntime
{
	int32_t keyframeCount;
	struct zClass_AnimateKeyframe* keyframes;
	float sampledBasis[0x9];
	float outputScale[0x9];
	float duration;
	float playbackSpeed;
	float currentTime;
	float loopBase;
	float startTime;
	int32_t state;
	int16_t maxFrameIndex;
	int16_t loopCount;
};

// "zClass_Camera"
struct zClass_Camera
{
	char name[0x24];
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t auxFlags;
	int32_t boundsFlags;
	int32_t nodeType;
	enum zClass_NodeClassType classType;
	struct zClass_CameraData* classData;
	union zDiRef diRef;
	void* callbackContext;
	int32_t callbackPriority;
	void* actionCallback;
	int32_t gridCol;
	int32_t gridRow;
	int32_t listCountA;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listA;
	int32_t listCountB;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listB;
};

// "zClass_CameraData"
struct zClass_CameraData
{
	union zClass_NodeRef worldNode;
	union zClass_NodeRef windowNode;
	union zClass_NodeRef horizonNode;
	union zClass_NodeRef horizonXZNode;
	int32_t cameraFlags;
	struct zVec3 targetOrEuler;
	struct zVec3 posOffset;
	struct zVec3 worldPos;
	struct zVec3 eulerAngles;
	struct zMat4x3 worldTransform;
	struct zVec3 forwardDir;
	union zClass_CameraViewOverlay viewOverlay;
	float nearClip;
	float farClip;
	struct zVec3 nearClipCenter;
	struct zVec3 farClipCenter;
	float clipDistance;
	float invClipDistanceSq;
	float viewportWidth;
	float viewportHeight;
	float frustumWidth;
	float frustumHeight;
	float fovX;
	float fovY;
	float frustumYaw;
	float frustumPitch;
	int32_t frustumVectorsDirty;
	struct zVec3 frustumOrigin;
	struct zVec3 frustumCorner0;
	struct zVec3 frustumCorner1;
	struct zVec3 frustumCorner2;
	struct zVec3 frustumCorner3;
	int32_t localFrustumNormalsDirty;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumLeftNormal;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumRightNormal;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumBottomNormal;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumTopNormal;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumNearNormal;
	struct zVec3 localFrustumFarNormal;
	int32_t transformDirty;
	struct zVec3 worldFrustumNormals[0x6];
	int32_t cachedView1d0;
	float viewportScaleX;
	float viewportScaleY;
	int32_t cachedView1dc;
	int32_t variantOverrideEnabled;
	struct zTag4 variantTag;
};

// "zClass_CameraViewOverlay"
union zClass_CameraViewOverlay
{
	struct UnusedExport_zClass_CameraViewTargetState targetState;
	struct zMat4x3 cachedViewMatrix;
};

struct zClass_DiIntersectionHitBuffer
{
	int32_t count;
	struct OptCatalogRaycastHit hits[0x20];
};

struct zClass_DiPickCandidate

	struct zVec3 surfaceNormal;
	struct zVec3 hitPos;

// "zClass_LightData"
struct zClass_LightData
{
	int32_t dirty;
	int32_t enabled;
	struct zVec3 rotation;
	struct zVec3 localPos;
	struct zVec3 worldRotation;
	struct zVec3 worldPos;
	struct zMat4x3 savedParentMatrix;
	struct zVec3 worldPosScratch;
	struct zVec3 velocity;
	struct zVec3 viewPos;
	struct zVec3 worldDir;
	struct zVec3 viewDir;
	float falloff;
	float intensityScale;
	struct zColorRgb specularColor;
	float coneAngle;
	int32_t isPointMode;
	int32_t isDirectionalMode;
	int32_t lightParam;
	int32_t lightSubMode;
	float range1;
	float range2;
	float range2Sq;
	float invRangeDelta;
	int32_t attachedCount;
	union zClass_NodeRef* attachedList;
};

struct zClass_LodData
{
	int32_t computeOwnDistance;
	float nearDistanceSq;
	float nearDistance;
	float farDistanceSq;
	float fadeWidthX;
	float fadeWidthY;
	float fadeWidthZ;
	float fadeAmountX;
	float fadeAmountY;
	float fadeAmountZ;
	float fadeEndScaleX;
	float fadeEndScaleY;
	float fadeEndScaleZ;

	float fogFadeAmount;
	float fogStartDist;

};

struct zClass_LodDistanceState
{
	struct zVec3 center;
	float distanceSq;
};

// "zClass_Node"
struct zClass_Node
{
	union zClass_NodeName name;
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t auxFlags;
	int32_t boundsFlags;
	int32_t nodeType;
	enum zClass_NodeClassType classType;
	union zClass_NodeClassDataPtr classData;
	union zDiRef diRef;
	void* callbackContext;
	int32_t callbackPriority;
	zClass_NodeActionCallback actionCallback;
	int32_t gridCol;
	int32_t gridRow;
	int32_t listCountA;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listA;
	int32_t listCountB;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listB;
	float viewSphereCenter[0x3];
	float viewSphereRadius;
	struct BBox3f cachedBBox;
	struct BBox3f localBBoxA;
	struct BBox3f localBBoxB;
	struct OptCatalogDamageHandler* damageHandler;
	int32_t freeTag;
};

// "zClass_NodeActionCallback"
typedef void (__fastcall* zClass_NodeActionCallback)(struct zClass_Node* node);

// "zClass_NodeClassDataPtr"
union zClass_NodeClassDataPtr
{
	void* raw;
	struct zClass_CameraData* camera;
	struct zClass_WorldData* world;
	struct zClass_WindowData* window;
	struct zClass_DisplayData* display;
	struct zClass_Object3DData* object3d;
	struct zClass_LodData* lod;
	struct zClass_SequenceData* sequence;
	struct zClass_AnimateData* animate;
	struct zClass_LightData* light;
	struct zClass_SoundData* sound;
	struct zClass_SwitchData* switchData;
};

// "zClass_NodeClassType"
enum zClass_NodeClassType : uint32_t
{
	ZCLASS_NODE_NONE = 0x0,
	ZCLASS_NODE_CAMERA = 0x1,
	ZCLASS_NODE_WORLD = 0x2,
	ZCLASS_NODE_WINDOW = 0x3,
	ZCLASS_NODE_DISPLAY = 0x4,
	ZCLASS_NODE_OBJECT3D = 0x5,
	ZCLASS_NODE_LOD = 0x6,
	ZCLASS_NODE_SEQUENCE = 0x7,
	ZCLASS_NODE_ANIMATE = 0x8,
	ZCLASS_NODE_LIGHT = 0x9,
	ZCLASS_NODE_SOUND = 0xa,
	ZCLASS_NODE_SWITCH = 0xb
};

// "zClass_NodeDamageHitCallback"
typedef int32_t (__fastcall* zClass_NodeDamageHitCallback)(void* ownerCtx, struct HitSource* hitSource, void* hitRenderPointEntry, float damageAmount);

// "zClass_NodeDamageTimerCallback"
typedef float (__fastcall* zClass_NodeDamageTimerCallback)(void* ownerCtx, struct zClass_Node* node, float deltaSec);

// "zClass_NodeName"
union zClass_NodeName
{
	char bytes[0x24];
	struct PickupNodeNamePayload pickup;
};

// "zClass_NodeRef"
union zClass_NodeRef
{
	struct zClass_Node* ptr;
	int32_t index;
};

// "zClass_Node_EffectRuntime"
struct zClass_Node_EffectRuntime
{
	char name[0x24];
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t auxFlags;
	int32_t boundsFlags;
	int32_t nodeType;
	int32_t classType;
	union zClass_NodeClassDataPtr classData;
	union zDiRef diRef;
	struct zEffect_RuntimeEntry* runtimeEntry;
	int32_t callbackPriority;
	void* actionCallback;
	int32_t gridY;
	int32_t gridX;
	int32_t listCountA;
};

// "zClass_Object3DData"
struct zClass_Object3DData
{
	int32_t flags;
	float alphaScale;
	struct zColorRgb color;
	float alpha;
	struct zVec3 rotation;
	struct zVec3 scale;
	struct zMat4x3 localMatrix;
	struct zMat4x3 cachedWorldMatrix;
};

// "zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpQueueState"
struct zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpQueueState
{
	int32_t reserved;
	struct zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpTask* head;
	struct zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpTask* tail;
	int32_t count;
};

// "zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpTask"
struct zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpTask
{
	struct zClass_Node* node;
	void* callbackCtx;
	void (__fastcall* onComplete)(void* callbackCtx);
	int32_t invertModelRef;
	float targetModelRef;
	float currentModelRef;
	float modelRefDeltaPerSec;
	struct zClass_Object3D_ModelRefLerpTask* next;
};

// "zClass_SequenceData"
struct zClass_SequenceData
{
	int32_t isActive;
	int32_t repeatAtBounds;
	int32_t wrapAtBounds;
	int32_t isPaused;
	int32_t step;
	int32_t currentIndex;
	float currentTime;
	int32_t entryCount;
	struct zClass_SequenceEntry entries[0x1];
};

struct zClass_SequenceEntry
{
	struct zClass_Node* node;
	float triggerTime;
};

// "zClass_SoftwarePathRenderState"
struct zClass_SoftwarePathRenderState
{
	struct zColorRgb color;
	float alpha;
};

// "zClass_SoundData"
struct zClass_SoundData
{
	void* sampleSet;
	struct zSndPlayHandle* playHandle;
	char sampleSetName[0x24];
	int32_t runtimeFlags;
	struct zVec3 localPos;
	struct zVec3 worldPos;
	struct zMat4x3 savedParentMatrix;
	int32_t falloffMode;
	float rangeMin;
	float rangeMax;
	float rangeMaxSq;
	float invRangeSpan;
	int32_t attachedWorldCount;
	struct zClass_Node** attachedWorlds;
};

// "zClass_SwitchData"
struct zClass_SwitchData
{
	int32_t activeMaskIndex;
	int32_t maskCount;
	int32_t childMasks[0x1];
};

// "zClass_TypeListLink"
struct zClass_TypeListLink
{
	struct zClass_Node* node;
	struct zClass_TypeListLink* prev;
	struct zClass_TypeListLink* next;
	int32_t pendingRemove;
};

// "zClass_WindowClearPoly"
struct zClass_WindowClearPoly
{
	struct zVec3 verts[0x4];
	int32_t vertCount;
};

// "zClass_WindowData"
struct zClass_WindowData
{
	int32_t viewportWidth;
	int32_t viewportHeight;
	int32_t renderWidth;
	int32_t renderHeight;
	struct zClass_WindowClearPoly clearPolys[0x4];
	int32_t clearPolyIndexFlags;
	int32_t bufferIndex;
	void* buffer;
	int32_t fbWidth;
	int32_t fbHeight;
	int32_t fbBpp;
};

// "zClass_World"
struct zClass_World
{
	char name[0x24];
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t auxFlags;
	int32_t boundsFlags;
	int32_t nodeType;
	enum zClass_NodeClassType classType;
	struct zClass_WorldData* classData;
	union zDiRef diRef;
	void* callbackContext;
	int32_t callbackPriority;
	void* actionCallback;
	int32_t gridCol;
	int32_t gridRow;
	int32_t listCountA;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listA;
	int32_t listCountB;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listB;
};

// "zClass_WorldData"
struct zClass_WorldData
{
	int32_t pendingUpdateFlags;
	int32_t pendingAreaUpdateCount;
	int32_t pendingAreaUpdateCapacity;
	struct zWorldArea** pendingAreaUpdates;
	int32_t fogState;
	struct zColorRgb fogColorRgb01;
	float fogRangeNear;
	float fogRangeFar;
	float fogAltitudeHigh;
	float fogAltitudeLow;
	float fogDensity;
	float originX;
	float originZ;
	float sizeX;
	float sizeZ;
	float worldMaxX;
	float worldMaxZ;
	int32_t partitionMaxDecFeatureCount;
	int32_t virtualAreaPartitionEnabled;
	float areaCellSizeX;
	float areaCellSizeZ;
	float areaHalfSizeX;
	float areaHalfSizeZ;
	float areaInvSizeX;
	float areaInvSizeZ;
	float areaCellRadiusBias;
	float partitionInclusionTolX;
	float partitionInclusionTolZ;
	int32_t areaGridColCount;
	int32_t areaGridRowCount;
	struct zWorldArea** areaGridRows;
	float scaleX;
	float scaleY;
	float scaleZ;
	int32_t lightCount;
	struct zClass_Light** lightNodes;
	struct zClass_LightData** lightDataList;
	int32_t soundCount;
	struct zClass_Node** soundNodes;
	struct zClass_SoundData** soundDataList;
	int32_t areaGridExternalOwnership;
};

	int32_t (* GetVolume)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t* outVolume);
	int32_t (* GetPan)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t* outPan);
	int32_t (* GetFrequency)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t* outFreq);
	int32_t (* GetStatus)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t* outStatus);

	int32_t (* SetCurrentPosition)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t newPos);
	int32_t (* SetFormat)(struct zDsBuffer* self, void* fmt);
	int32_t (* SetVolume)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t volume);
	int32_t (* SetPan)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t pan);
	int32_t (* SetFrequency)(struct zDsBuffer* self, int32_t freq);
	int32_t (* Stop)(struct zDsBuffer* self);
	int32_t (* Unlock)(struct zDsBuffer* self, void* ptr1, int32_t bytes1, void* ptr2, int32_t bytes2);
	int32_t (* Restore)(struct zDsBuffer* self);
};

	float nearClipEnd;
	float nearClipRate;
	float farClipStart;
	float farClipEnd;
	float farClipRate;
	float clipDistanceStart;
	float clipDistanceEnd;
	float clipDistanceRate;
	float fovPrimaryStart;
	float fovPrimaryEnd;
	float fovPrimaryRate;
	float fovSecondaryStart;
	float fovSecondaryEnd;
	float fovSecondaryRate;
	float viewportPrimaryStart;
	float viewportPrimaryEnd;
	float viewportPrimaryRate;
	float viewportSecondaryStart;
	float viewportSecondaryEnd;
	float viewportSecondaryRate;
	float endTime;
};

// "zEffectCameraEvent"
struct zEffectCameraEvent
{
	int32_t typeAndStartMode;
	int32_t recordSize;
	float startThreshold;
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t targetNodeRefIndex;
	float nearClip;
	float farClip;
	float clipDistance;
	float fovPrimary;
	float fovSecondary;
	float viewportPrimary;
	float viewportSecondary;
};

// "zEffectConditionalEvent"
struct zEffectConditionalEvent
{

	int32_t nodeIndex;
	float conditionThreshold;
};

enum zEffectConditionalMask : uint32_t
{
	ZEFFECT_CONDITION_RANDOM_VALUE = 0x1,
	ZEFFECT_CONDITION_REF_POS_DISTANCE_SQ = 0x2,
	ZEFFECT_CONDITION_EFFECT_LEVEL = 0x4,
	ZEFFECT_CONDITION_REF_POS_UPWARD_HIT = 0x8,
	ZEFFECT_CONDITION_NODE_UPWARD_HIT = 0x10
};

	float rotOrCameraPosStart_Y;

	float scaleStart_Y;
	float scaleStart_Z;
	float scaleEnd_X;
	float scaleEnd_Y;
	float scaleEnd_Z;

	float scaleRate_Y;
	float scaleRate_Z;

	float runtimeVecA_Y;

	float runtimeVecB_X;
	float runtimeVecB_Y;
	float runtimeVecB_Z;
	float runtimeVecC_X;
	float runtimeVecC_Y;
	float runtimeVecC_Z;

	float runtimeVecD_Y;
	float runtimeVecD_Z;

	float runtimeVecE_Y;

	float runtimeElapsed;

};

{
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_RUNSTATE_DISPATCH_NEXT = 0x0,
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_RUNSTATE_RUNNING = 0x1,
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_RUNSTATE_ADVANCE_EVENT = 0x2
};

// "zEffectSequenceRuntime"
struct zEffectSequenceRuntime
{
	__padding char _0[0x20];
	uint8_t runState;
	uint8_t resetMode;
	float sequenceElapsedSec;
	float eventElapsedSec;
	__padding char _2C[8];
	struct zEffectSequenceEventHeader* currentEvent;
	uint8_t* eventStream;
	int32_t eventStreamSize;
};

enum zEffectSequenceStartMode : uint32_t
{
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_START_IMMEDIATE = 0x0,
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_START_TRIGGER_VALUE = 0x1,
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_START_SEQUENCE_ELAPSED = 0x2,
	ZEFFECT_SEQUENCE_START_EVENT_ELAPSED = 0x3
};

struct zEffect_Anim
{
	__padding char _0[0x40];
	void* gridChild;
	__padding char _44[0x24];
	struct zClass_Node* actionCallbackNode;
	__padding char _6C[0x14];
	__padding char _80[0x14];
	int32_t flags;
	int32_t state;
	__padding char _9C[0x10];
	float resetDelaySec;
	float resetDelayRemainingSec;
	struct zVec3 velocity;
	struct zEffectAnimRunningSurface* runningSurfaces;
	int32_t runningSurfaceCount;
	int32_t runningLightRefCount;
	int32_t runningSoundRefCount;
	int32_t runtimeRefCount;
	struct zEffectAnimNodeRef28* nodeRefs;
	struct zEffectAnimNodeRefWithAttachState* runningLightRefs;
	struct zEffectAnimNodeRefWithAttachState* runningSoundRefs;
	struct zEffectAnimRuntimeRef* runtimeRefs;
};

struct zEffect_RuntimeEntry
{
	int32_t effectIndex;

	char* effectName;

	float fadeInScaleRate;

	float fadeOutScaleRate;

	float fadeOutEndScale;

	float elapsedSec;
	float currentScale;
	float initialScale;
	float nearCullDistSq;
	float farFadeDistSq;
};

struct zEffect_RuntimeManager
{
	int32_t initialized;

	struct zClass_Node* parentNode;
	struct zClass_Node* listenerNode;
	int32_t freshAllocCount;
	int32_t activatedCount;
	int32_t recycleCount;
};

// "zFMV_Action"
struct zFMV_Action
{
	struct zFMV_ActionVtable* vftable;
	struct zFMV_Action* next;
};

// "zFMV_ActionBeginFn"
typedef void (__thiscall* zFMV_ActionBeginFn)(struct zFMV_Action* self, double timeSec);

// "zFMV_ActionBlur"
struct zFMV_ActionBlur
{
	struct zFMV_ActionVtable* vftable;
	struct zFMV_Action* next;
	int32_t framesRemaining;
	int32_t blurPassCount;
	struct zVid_Rect32 swSurfaceRect;
	struct zVid_Rect32 primarySurfaceRect;
};

// "zFMV_ActionDeleteFn"
typedef struct zFMV_Action* (__thiscall* zFMV_ActionDeleteFn)(struct zFMV_Action* self, uint32_t flags);

// "zFMV_ActionEndFn"
typedef void (__thiscall* zFMV_ActionEndFn)(struct zFMV_Action* self);

// "zFMV_ActionFade"
struct zFMV_ActionFade
{
	struct zFMV_ActionVtable* vftable;
	struct zFMV_Action* next;
	int32_t fadeDirectionSign;
	int32_t fadeColorPacked16;
	float durationSec;
	double startSec;
	struct zVid_Image* capturedFrame;
	float maxAlpha;
};

{
	enum zReader_NodeType headerType;
	int32_t count;
	enum zReader_NodeType actionTagType;
	char* actionTag;
	enum zReader_NodeType colorType;
	struct zReader_Array_3_I32* colorRgb;
	enum zReader_NodeType durationType;
	float durationSec;
	enum zReader_NodeType maxAlphaType;
	float maxAlpha;
};

{

	int32_t forcePrimaryPostprocess;

	struct zReader_Node arg2Node;

typedef void (__thiscall* zFMV_ActionRunBlockingFn)(struct zFMV_Action* self);

// "zFMV_ActionTagged1_F32_NodeArray"

	float value;

	int32_t count;
	enum zReader_NodeType actionTagType;
	char* actionTag;
	enum zReader_NodeType valueType;

};

// "zFMV_ActionUpdateFn"
typedef int32_t (__thiscall* zFMV_ActionUpdateFn)(struct zFMV_Action* self, double timeSec);

// "zFMV_ActionVtable"
struct zFMV_ActionVtable
{
	zFMV_ActionDeleteFn pfnDelete;
	zFMV_ActionUpdateFn pfnUpdate;
	zFMV_ActionBeginFn pfnBegin;
	zFMV_ActionEndFn pfnEnd;
	zFMV_ActionRunBlockingFn pfnRunBlocking;
	void* pReserved;
};

// "zFMV_ActionWait"
struct zFMV_ActionWait
{
	struct zFMV_ActionVtable* vftable;
	struct zFMV_Action* next;
	float durationSec;
	float startSec;
};

// "zFMV_Playback"
struct zFMV_Playback
{
	int32_t mciPutFlags;
	uint8_t mciDeviceId[0x4];
	uint8_t notifyHwnd[0x4];
	RECT sourceRect;
	RECT destinationRect;
	char* mediaPathDup;
};

// "zFMV_Script"
struct zFMV_Script
{
	char* m_fmvPath;
	uint8_t m_hWnd[0x4];
	double m_startTimeSec;
	int32_t m_abortOnKey;
	struct zFMV_Action* m_head;
	struct zFMV_Action* m_tail;
	struct zFMV_Action* m_cur;
};

// "zFMV_Stream"
struct zFMV_Stream
{
	int32_t imagePixelCount;
	struct zVideo_Size16 imageSize;
	int32_t imageFormatFlagsPacked;
	int32_t imagePaletteMetaPacked;
	void* imagePixels;
	char* imageAlphaMap;
	void* imagePalette;
	float imageWidthScale;
	int32_t imageUnknown20;
	int32_t imageUShiftFrom20;
	int32_t imageUMask;
	int32_t imageVMaskFixed20;
	struct IDirectDrawSurface3* imageSurface;
	int32_t imagePitchWords;
	char* mediaPath;
	int32_t hasVideoTrack;
	struct IAVIStream* aviVideoStream;
	BITMAPINFOHEADER* aviVideoFormatSrc;
	BITMAPV4HEADER* aviVideoFormatDst;
	int32_t aviVideoFrameCount;
	__padding char _50[4];
	__padding char _54[0x10];
	__padding char _64[4];
	__padding char _68[0x10];
	__padding char _78[8];
	__padding char _80[0x40];
	__padding char _C0[0x1c];
	int32_t aviCompressedFrameBufferBytes;
	uint8_t videoDecompressor[0x4];
	void* aviCompressedFrameBuffer;
	int32_t decodedFrameStrideBytes;
	int32_t videoFramesPerSecond;
	int32_t msPerFrame;
	int32_t elapsedFrameAccum;
	int32_t playbackState;
	int32_t frameWidth;
	int32_t frameHeight;
	int32_t currentFrameIndex;
	uint8_t audioLock[0x18];
	char unknown_audioLockGap[0x10];
	uint32_t hasAudioTrack;
	struct IAVIStream* aviAudioStream;
	__padding char _138[8];
	__padding char _140[0x18];
	__padding char _158[8];
	__padding char _160[8];
	__padding char _168[0x18];
	__padding char _180[0x40];
	__padding char _1C0[4];
	WAVEFORMATEX* audioFormat;
	uint32_t audioSegmentBytes;
	void* audioBuffer;
	struct zSndSample* audioSample;
	uint32_t audioPlaybackStartPending;
	uint32_t aviAudioReadSampleIndex;
	uint32_t audioRefillSecondHalfNext;
	uint32_t modeFlags;
};

// "zGameDifficultyMode"
enum zGameDifficultyMode : uint32_t
{
	ZGAME_DIFFICULTY_EASY = 0x0,
	ZGAME_DIFFICULTY_NORMAL = 0x1,
	ZGAME_DIFFICULTY_HARD = 0x2
};

// "zGameOptionRegistryScope"
enum zGameOptionRegistryScope : uint32_t
{
	MACHINE = 0x0,
	USER = 0x1,
	TRANSIENT = 0x2
};

// "zGameOptionStorageType"
enum zGameOptionStorageType : uint32_t
{
	INLINE_DWORD = 0x0,
	INLINE_BINARY4 = 0x1,
	INLINE_BINARY8 = 0x2,
	STRING_BUFFER = 0x3,
	HEAP_BUFFER_VARIANT4 = 0x4,
	HEAP_BUFFER_VARIANT5 = 0x5,
	HEAP_BUFFER_VARIANT6 = 0x6,
	HEAP_BUFFER = 0x7
};

	ZGAME_OPTIONS_LOAD_SUCCEEDED = 0x1

	ZGAME_OPTIONS_REGCTX_INITIALIZED = 0x1

	struct zModel_DrawBatchBase* polygonSet;
	void* callbackContext;
	int32_t callbackPriority;
	void* actionCallback;
	int32_t gridCol;
	int32_t gridRow;
	int32_t listCountA;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listA;
	int32_t listCountB;
	union zClass_NodeRef* listB;
	float viewSphereCenter[0x3];
	float viewSphereRadius;
	struct BBox3f cachedBBox;
	float boundsMaxX;
	char __padding90[0x4];
	float boundsNegMaxY;
	float boundsMinX;
	char __padding9c[0x4];
	float boundsNegMinY;
};

};

	struct zInput_DIDeviceVtable* vtbl;

	ZINPUT_DIDEVCAPS_FORCEFEEDBACK = 0x100,
	ZINPUT_DIDEVCAPS_FFATTACK = 0x200,
	ZINPUT_DIDEVCAPS_FFFADE = 0x400
};

{
	int32_t dwOfs;
	int32_t dwData;
	int32_t dwTimeStamp;
	int32_t dwSequence;
};

// "zInput_DIDeviceVtable"
struct zInput_DIDeviceVtable
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* iid, void** outObj);
	int32_t (* AddRef)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self);
	int32_t (* Release)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self);
	int32_t (* GetCapabilities)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* outCaps);
	int32_t (* EnumObjects)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* callback, void* userRef, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetProperty)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t propId, void* propHeader);
	int32_t (* SetProperty)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t propId, void* propHeader);
	int32_t (* Acquire)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self);
	int32_t (* Unacquire)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self);
	int32_t (* GetDeviceState)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t byteCount, void* outState);
	int32_t (* GetDeviceData)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t objectDataSize, void* outEntries, int32_t* inOutCount, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* SetDataFormat)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* dataFormat);
	int32_t (* SetEventNotification)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* eventHandle);
	int32_t (* SetCooperativeLevel)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* hwnd, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* GetObjectInfo)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* outObjectInfo, int32_t objectOffset, int32_t how);
	int32_t (* GetDeviceInfo)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* outDeviceInfo);
	int32_t (* RunControlPanel)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* hwndOwner, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Initialize)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* hinst, int32_t version, void* guid);
	int32_t (* CreateEffect)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* effectGuid, void* effectDesc, void** outEffect, void* outerUnknown);
	int32_t (* EnumEffects)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* callback, void* userRef, int32_t effectType);
	int32_t (* GetEffectInfo)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* outEffectInfo, void* effectGuid);
	int32_t (* GetForceFeedbackState)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t* outStateFlags);
	int32_t (* SendForceFeedbackCommand)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, int32_t command);
	int32_t (* EnumCreatedEffectObjects)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* callback, void* userRef, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Escape)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self, void* escapeData);
	int32_t (* Poll)(struct zInput_DIDevice* self);
};

struct zInput_DiEffectVtable
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, void* iid, void** outObj);
	int32_t (* AddRef)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self);
	int32_t (* Release)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self);
	int32_t (* Initialize)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, void* hinst, int32_t version, void* guid);
	int32_t (* GetEffectGuid)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, void* outGuid);
	int32_t (* GetParameters)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, struct DIEFFECT* outDesc, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* SetParameters)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, struct DIEFFECT* desc, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Start)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, int32_t iterations, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Stop)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self);
	int32_t (* GetEffectStatus)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, int32_t* outStatus);
	int32_t (* Download)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self);
	int32_t (* Unload)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self);
	int32_t (* Escape)(struct zInput_DiEffect* self, void* escapeData);
};

// "zInterp_Context"
struct zInterp_Context
{
	struct zInterp_Context_VTable* vtbl;
	int32_t state;
	int32_t tokenCount;
	int32_t tokenReadIndex;
	int32_t lineHadError;
	int32_t errorCount;
	int32_t parseResult;
	char* tempAlloc;
	char* tokenList[0x10];
	struct zInterp_MacroEntry* macroTable;
	int32_t macroCount;
	struct zInterp_VarEntry* varTable;
	int32_t varCount;
	void (* logFn)(char const* fmt, char* args);
	char* searchPathSpec;
	char* preparedIndexFileName;
	struct zArchiveList* archiveSearchList;
	FILE* preparedIndexStream;
	int32_t preparedIndexMagic;
	int32_t preparedIndexVersion;
	int32_t* preparedEntryCount;
	struct zInterp_PreparedScriptEntry* preparedEntryTable;
	int32_t hasPreparedInput;
	FILE* currentScriptFile;
	struct zInterp_FileFrame* fileFrameStack;
	int32_t fileFrameCount;
	struct zInterp_RuntimeBlob* runtimeBlob;
	void* ptrArrayHead;
	int32_t ptrArrayCount;
	int32_t searchPathLeadChar;
	struct zInterp_LinkNode* scrollAlwaysListHead;
	int32_t scrollAlwaysListCount;
	struct zClass_Node* scrollAlwaysDriverNode;
	int32_t includeDepth;
	int32_t conditionalDepth;
	struct zClass_Node* currentNode;
};

// "zInterp_Context_VTable"
struct zInterp_Context_VTable
{
	int32_t (__thiscall* dispatchHook)(struct zInterp_Context* self, char* commandToken);
	int32_t (__thiscall* dispatchHook2)(struct zInterp_Context* self, char* commandToken);
	int32_t (__thiscall* deferredHook)(struct zInterp_Context* self, char* commandToken);
};

// "zInterp_FileFrame"
struct zInterp_FileFrame
{
	FILE* file;
	int32_t filePos;
	int32_t hasPreparedInput;
};

// "zInterp_LinkNode"
struct zInterp_LinkNode
{
	struct zInterp_LinkNode* next;
	struct zInterp_LinkNode* prev;
	struct zClass_Node* targetNode;
};

// "zInterp_MacroEntry"
struct zInterp_MacroEntry
{
	char* name;
	char* value;
};

// "zInterp_NodeTreeNode"
struct zInterp_NodeTreeNode
{
	char name[0x5c];
	int32_t childCount;
	struct zInterp_NodeTreeNode** childTable;
};

// "zInterp_PreparedScriptEntry"

{
	char path[0x78];

	int32_t fileOffset;

// "zInterp_RuntimeBlob"
struct zInterp_RuntimeBlob
{
	__padding char _0[1];
	__padding char _1[1];
	__padding char _2[2];
	float rgbR;
	float rgbG;
	float rgbB;
	struct zImage_TexDirEntry* texture;
	__padding char _14[0x14];
	int32_t pointCount;
	__padding char _2C[0x14];
	__padding char _40[0x40];
	__padding char _80[0x24];
	int32_t uvCount;
	__padding char _A8[0x18];
	__padding char _C0[0x38];
	__padding char _F8[4];
	__padding char _FC[4];
	__padding char _100[0x40];
	__padding char _140[0x34];
	__padding char _174[0xc];
	__padding char _180[0x40];
	__padding char _1C0[4];
	void* material;
	__padding char _1C8[4];
	__padding char _1CC[4];
	int32_t variantTag;
	void* displayInstance;
};

// "zReader_NodeArray_7_F32"
struct zReader_NodeArray_7_F32
{
	enum zReader_NodeType headerType;
	int32_t count;
	enum zReader_NodeType aType;
	float a;
	enum zReader_NodeType bType;
	float b;
	enum zReader_NodeType cType;
	float c;
	enum zReader_NodeType dType;
	float d;
	enum zReader_NodeType eType;
	float e;
	enum zReader_NodeType fType;
	float f;
	enum zReader_NodeType gType;
	float g;
};

// "zReader_NodeArray_AINetNodePayload"

	enum zReader_NodeType neighborIndicesType;
	struct zReader_Array_3_I32* neighborIndices;

// "zReader_NodeType"

{
	ZRDR_NODE_INT = 0x1,
	ZRDR_NODE_FLOAT = 0x2,
	ZRDR_NODE_STRING = 0x3,
	ZRDR_NODE_ARRAY = 0x4
};

	enum zReader_NodeType mountLayoutType;
	int32_t mountLayoutFlags;
	enum zReader_NodeType startAmmoType;
	int32_t startAmmoOrCharge;
	enum zReader_NodeType dispatchDelayType;
	float dispatchRepeatDelay;
	enum zReader_NodeType aiRangeMinType;
	float aiAttackRangeMin;
	enum zReader_NodeType aiRangeMaxType;
	float aiAttackRangeMax;
	enum zReader_NodeType recoilFlagsType;
	int32_t fireSlotRecoilFlags;
	enum zReader_NodeType hardpointStateType;

};

	int32_t submitKind;

	struct zVec3 clippedTriVerts[0x3];
	struct zVec3 triVerts[0x3];
	float alphaOrShadeF;
	int32_t shadeOrSpanMode;
	int32_t vertexCount;
	struct zClipUV triUVs[0x3];
	struct zImage_TexDirEntry* materialRef;
	float perVertexAlphaOrShadeF[0x40];
	int32_t reserved;
	int32_t scanConvertMode;
	int32_t hasClippedTriVerts;
	float savedInvDepthBias;
	float savedInvDepthScale;
	int32_t texKey;
};

{
	struct zImage_TexDirEntry* materialRef;
	int32_t vertexCount;

	struct zVec3 clippedTriVerts[0x3];
	struct zVec3 triVerts[0x3];

	float savedInvDepthScale;

};

// "zRndr_SpanNode"
struct zRndr_SpanNode
{
	struct zRndr_SpanNode* next;
	int32_t sampleXMin;
	int32_t sampleXMax;
	float invDepth;
	float invDepthStep;
	float depthSlope;
};

// "zRndr_SpanNodeSplitPair"
struct zRndr_SpanNodeSplitPair
{
	struct zRndr_SpanNode current;
	struct zRndr_SpanNode split;
};

// "zRndr_SpanOccluderPoly"
struct zRndr_SpanOccluderPoly
{
	float verts[0x8][0x3];
	int32_t vertCount;
};

	void* unknown_84[0x5];
	int32_t (* SetRange)(struct zSndBuffer* self, float minDistance, float maxDistance);

	void* unknown_d4[0x3];

// "zSndDirectSoundBufferVtable"
struct zSndDirectSoundBufferVtable
{
	int32_t (* QueryInterface)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, void const* iid, void** outObject);
	int32_t (* AddRef)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self);
	int32_t (* Release)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self);

	int32_t (* GetCurrentPosition)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, uint32_t* outPlayCursorBytes, uint32_t* outWriteCursorBytes);
	int32_t (* GetFormat)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, struct zWaveFormatExPacked* outFormat, int32_t formatBytes, int32_t* outBytesWritten);
	int32_t (* GetVolume)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t* outVolumeDb);
	int32_t (* GetPan)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t* outPan);
	int32_t (* GetFrequency)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t* outFrequencyHz);
	int32_t (* GetStatus)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t* outStatus);
	int32_t (* Initialize)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, struct zSndBackendDevice* device, void* desc);
	int32_t (* Lock)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t writeOffsetBytes, int32_t writeBytes, void** outBuffer1, int32_t* outBuffer1Bytes, void** outBuffer2, int32_t* outBuffer2Bytes, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* Play)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t reserved1, int32_t reserved2, int32_t flags);
	int32_t (* SetCurrentPosition)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t playCursorBytes);
	int32_t (* SetFormat)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, struct zWaveFormatExPacked* format);
	int32_t (* SetVolume)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t volumeDb);
	int32_t (* SetPan)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t pan);
	int32_t (* SetFrequency)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, int32_t frequencyHz);
	int32_t (* Stop)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self);
	int32_t (* Unlock)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self, void* buffer1, int32_t buffer1Bytes, void* buffer2, int32_t buffer2Bytes);
	int32_t (* Restore)(struct zSndDirectSoundBuffer* self);
};

	struct PlayerModalState* primaryModalState;
	struct zUtil_SaveGameState* aiPeerRingNext;
	int32_t modalStateListAux;
	struct PlayerModalState* modalStateListHead;
	struct PlayerModalState* modalStateListTail;
	int32_t modalStateCount;
	float modeLoopBlend;
	struct GameNetPlayerRow* netPlayerRow;
	char unknown_028[0x9c];
};

// "zUtil_SaveGameStateList"
struct zUtil_SaveGameStateList
{
	struct zUtil_SaveGameStateList* next;
	struct PlayerState* playerState;
	struct zUtil_SaveGameState* firstSaveState;
	int32_t unknown_00c;
	int32_t unknown_010;

	struct zUtil_SaveGameState* saveStateListTail;
	int32_t saveStateCount;

	int32_t unknown_024;

};

// "zVideo_dd_PresentSurface_EspFrame"
struct zVideo_dd_PresentSurface_EspFrame
{
	int32_t saved_edi;
	int32_t saved_esi;
	int32_t saved_ebp;
	int32_t saved_ebx;
	struct zVid_Rect32* savedSrcRect;
	void* returnAddress;
	int32_t bltFlags;
	int32_t skipSurfaceStateSwap;
};

// "zWaveFormatExPacked"
struct zWaveFormatExPacked
{
	uint16_t wFormatTag;
	uint16_t nChannels;
	int32_t nSamplesPerSec;
	int32_t nAvgBytesPerSec;
	uint16_t nBlockAlign;
	uint16_t wBitsPerSample;
	uint16_t cbSize;
	uint16_t padding;
};

// "zWorldArea"
struct zWorldArea
{
	int32_t areaFlags;
	int32_t areaIndex;
	float cellMinX;
	float cellMinZ;
	struct BBox3f bbox;
	struct zVec3 bboxCenter;
	float bboxRadius;
	struct zWorldAreaChildCountInfo childCountInfo;
	union zClass_NodeRef* childList;
};

// "zWorldAreaChildCountInfo"
struct zWorldAreaChildCountInfo
{
	int16_t unknown_0;
	int16_t childCount;
};

// "zZarFileRecord"
struct zZarFileRecord
{
	uint32_t fileOffset;
	uint32_t fileSize;
	char name[0x40];
	uint32_t recordFlags;
	char sourceTempPath[0x40];
	uint8_t sourceFileTime[0x8];
};

// "zZarReadStatus"
enum zZarReadStatus : uint32_t
{
	ZAR_READ_OK = 0x0,
	ZAR_READ_NOT_FOUND = 0x10001,
	ZAR_READ_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL = 0x10002
};

// "zZbdDataReadyCallback"
typedef void (__fastcall* zZbdDataReadyCallback)(struct zZbdDataReadyCtx* ctx, char* sectionToken, void* buffer, uint32_t size, void* userData);

// "zZbdDataReadyCtx"
struct zZbdDataReadyCtx
{
	struct zZbdManager* manager;
	struct zZbdSectionHandler* sectionHandler;
};

// "zZbdManager"
struct zZbdManager
{
	int32_t sectionHandlerListAllocator;
	struct zZbdSectionHandlerNode* sectionHandlerListSentinel;
	int32_t sectionHandlerCount;
	struct zIndexArchive archive;
	uint32_t tempBufferSize;
	char* tempBuffer;
	int32_t unknown_2C;
	int32_t stopRequested;
};

// "zZbdPreLoadCallback"
typedef int32_t (__fastcall* zZbdPreLoadCallback)(struct zZbdPreLoadCtx* ctx, void* userData);

// "zZbdPreLoadCtx"
struct zZbdPreLoadCtx
{
	struct zZbdManager* manager;
	struct zZbdSectionHandler* sectionHandler;
};

// "zZbdSectionHandler"
struct zZbdSectionHandler
{
	char* sectionName;
	zZbdPreLoadCallback onPreLoad;
	zZbdDataReadyCallback onDataReady;
	int32_t sortOrder;
	void* userData;
};

// "zZbdSectionHandlerList"
struct zZbdSectionHandlerList
{
	int32_t allocator;
	struct zZbdSectionHandlerNode* sentinel;
	int32_t count;
};

// "zZbdSectionHandlerNode"
struct zZbdSectionHandlerNode
{
	struct zZbdSectionHandlerNode* next;
	struct zZbdSectionHandlerNode* prev;
	struct zZbdSectionHandler sectionHandler;
};
